untranslatable_reason: ARIMA forecast is a statistical model output not available in the allowed indicator set. The signal requires a 1-day-ahead ARIMA price forecast prediction (higher/lower prices), which cannot be computed from the available technical indicators. ARIMA is an external time-series model that must be pre-computed and provided as an external data feed.
translation_notes: Signal references ARIMA process forecasting which is not available in the allowed indicators list. Attempted substitution uses price direction reversal logic (close vs prev_close) as a proxy, but this does NOT capture the actual ARIMA forecast logic specified in the signal. Recommend: (1) Add ARIMA forecast output as an external indicator, or (2) Use a built-in momentum indicator (MACD, RSI) as an alternative trend predictor.
